title: Munir Zulu and Anor v Attorney  General and Ors (2025/CCZ/009) [2025] ZMCC 31 (10 December 2025)
case_name: Munir Zulu and Anor v Attorney  General and Ors
issue_tags: Order 9 Rule 20(1) only prescribes mode of commencement
must invoke specific rule or statutory authority
interlocutory relief inappropriate after final determination
outcome_detail: Application for contempt dismissed for being procedurally misconceived for failing to invoke a proper rule or authority
